title: Bauer Professional Facial Spa Face Steamer and Nasal Inhaler Set, Removes Blackheads & Opens Pores and Sinuses, Fast Heating, Aromatherapy Tray
features: AQUA CARE FACIAL SAUNA – For some luxurious self-care, use this facial sauna to achieve cleaner and softer skin, improve skin health and hydration as well as to remove blackheads and ease nasal congestion.
HEATS UP QUICKLY – The PTC heating function allows the facial sauna to heat up quickly so it can be set up and ready for you to use in a matter of minutes.

STEAM CLEANSING – The sauna uses clean water to produce micro steam particles which work to give you a radiant and glowing complexion. Use the adjustable steam control to aid in the removal of makeup, or any bacteria or debris on the skin.

ACCESSORIES INCLUDED – The sauna includes a nasal steamer, tray for optional use of essential oils and a 50ml water measuring cup, so you have everything you need to enjoy a relaxing facial pamper experience at home.
BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer professional is the leading manufacturer of top-quality hair, beauty & personal care products. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
